rules.text: When the denial letter states an appeal deadline, repeat that deadline explicitly in the appeal and request timely review.
Request the claim file and the specific clinical criteria applied, in writing, when the denial cites guidelines without enough detail to rebut.
Keep tone factual and person-centered. This is draft assistance only — not legal or medical advice.
Attack plan exclusions for substance-use-disorder withdrawal management by citing state parity mandates, which require fully-insured plans to provide these benefits at parity with medical care.

Rebut outdated policies by citing current ASAM 4th edition criteria. Use specific clinical facts—such as prior complicated withdrawal, seizure history, high CIWA-Ar scores, and ER physician judgment—to prove outpatient withdrawal management is unsafe.
